a.xlink:title: Write an Output report to a HID device.
Updates PoKeys I/O states from and to hardware.
Placeholder function to perform encoder-specific setup actions.
Reads additional Pulse Engine v2 parameters from the PoKeys device.
Updates and sets additional Pulse Engine v2 parameters, such as the emergency input pin.
Applies INI-based configuration to PulseEngine and IO.
Retrieves and parses the axis configuration from the PoKeys Pulse Engine v2.
Set the axis configuration of the PoKeys device.
Sets the state of external relay and open-collector outputs on the PoKeys device.
Configures and applies Pulse Engine v2 settings to the PoKeys device.
Reads and updates the state of dedicated limit and home inputs from the PoKeys Pulse Engine v2.
Retrieves and processes the current status of the PoKeys Pulse Engine v2 (PEv2).
Reads configuration parameters for the PoKeys Pulse Engine v2 from the INI file.
Initializes the PoKeys digital and analog I/O configuration.
